title: Real-Time ASR in 2026: Streaming Recognition Explained

pages.title: Four Clocks Shape Live ASR
pages.kicker: Low latency is several competing delays, not one benchmark number.

cards.title: First partial
cards.body: How quickly any useful text appears after speech begins.

cards.title: Revision
cards.body: How long uncertain words continue to change on screen.

cards.title: Endpoint
cards.body: How long the system waits before declaring a turn complete.

cards.title: Finalization
cards.body: When text becomes safe for storage, search, or action.

pages.title: Transcript States Need A Contract
pages.kicker: Applications should know which text is provisional, stable, final, or authorized for action.

cards.title: Interim
cards.body: Fast hypotheses can revise as more acoustic context arrives.

cards.title: Stable
cards.body: Anchored text changes rarely enough for local UI and reasoning.

cards.title: Final
cards.body: A completed segment can be persisted and reprocessed.

cards.title: Action gate
cards.body: Product policy decides whether final text may trigger anything.
